intent: Write a short 'should I buy this category' brief on pet supplies for a first-time dog owner. You MUST research BOTH sources: (1) the One Stop Market shopping site — browse the pet-supplies category and collect at least 3 products covering different needs (feeding, grooming, and toys/enrichment). Record name, price, rating, and review count for each. (2) Reddit — search /f/LifeProTips for posts about pet ownership costs, money-saving tips for new pet owners, or items new owners regret buying; collect at least 2 relevant posts with title, score, and comment count. The report must: (a) present the 3 storefront products with a one-line pitch and citation, (b) summarize what Reddit says is worth the money versus a waste, (c) conclude with a single sentence recommendation for a first-week buy. Keep it short but every factual claim needs a markdown citation.
author_notes: Easy-tier shopping+reddit task. Short brief format; only 2 sites, 3 products, 2 posts.
